        have h_count := Finset.card_filter_dvd_Ico' hprime.ne_zero hA (Nat.le_refl B)
        rw [h_count]
        rw [h_len]
        -- Prove (B-1)/p - (A-1)/p >= (B-A)/p
        apply Nat.le_div_sub_div_of_sub_eq_div (k:=p) (m:=B-1) (n:=A-1) _
        · rw [Nat.sub_sub_sub_cancel_right (Nat.le_pred_of_lt (Multiset.mem_Ico.mp (Multiset.mem_Ico_of_Ico P.M (by simp) (by simp) (by simp))).2)]
          congr
        · exact Nat.sub_le_sub_right (Nat.sub_le_self _ _) _
      exact this
    calc (P.M : ℤ) * ((Finset.Ico A B).filter (p ∣ ·)).card - (P.n / p : ℤ)
       ≥ (P.M : ℤ) * ((P.n / P.M) / p) - (P.n / p : ℤ) := by
         rw [h_len] at h_card; gcongr
     _ = (P.M : ℤ) * (P.n / (P.M * p)) - (P.n / p) := by rw [Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul]
     _ = (P.M : ℤ) * ((P.n / p) / P.M) - (P.n / p) := by rw [Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul, mul_comm]
     _ = -((P.n / p) % P.M : ℤ) := by
       have h_mod : P.n / p = P.M * ((P.n / p) / P.M) + (P.n / p) % P.M := (Nat.div_add_mod _ _).symm
       nth_rw 2 [h_mod]; ring
     _ > -(P.M : ℤ) := neg_lt_neg_iff.mpr (Int.ofNat_lt.mpr (Nat.mod_lt _ (pos_of_gt P.hL).trans_le (by exact_mod_cast P.hL)))
  · simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum,
      Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime, Nat.cast_zero, sub_zero]
    exact (sum_nonneg fun _ _ ↦ Nat.cast_nonneg _).trans_ge (neg_le_of_neg_lt (by simp [P.hL_pos]))

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hsum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum =
        P.M * (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).filter (fun m ↦ 0 < m ∧ p ∣ m) |>.card := by
      rw [Factorization.sum, Params.initial, Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.filter_filter]
      have : ∀ m ∈ (replicate P.M (Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join,
          m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers ∧ p ∣ m ↔ 0 < m ∧ p ∣ m := fun m hm ↦ by
        simp only [mem_join, mem_replicate, mem_Ico] at hm
        constructor
        · rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩; exact ⟨pos_of_ne_zero (ne_of_mem_smoothNumbers h1).1, h2⟩
        · rintro ⟨hpos, hdiv⟩; refine ⟨?_, hdiv⟩
          rw [mem_smoothNumbers, Nat.primeFactors_mul hpos hdiv]
          intro q hq
          rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hq with h | h
          · have : q = p := (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq (prime_of_mem_primeFactors h) hprime).mp (dvd_of_mem_primeFactors h); subst this; exact hp
          · have : m < P.n := hm.1.2
            have : m / p < P.n / p := Nat.div_lt_div_of_lt_of_dvd hdiv this hprime.pos
            have : q ≤ m / p := Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd hpos hdiv) hprime.pos) (dvd_of_mem_primeFactors h)
            apply le_trans this
            apply le_trans (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_le_of_lt (by exact_mod_cast P.n.zero_le) hp') hp'))
            rw [← Real.le_sqrt_iff (by exact_mod_cast P.n.zero_le)] at hp'
            apply le_of_lt
            exact lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left (lt_of_le_of_lt hp' (lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_div_iff₀ (by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos) |>.mpr (by
              rw [mul_comm]; apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right (Real.lt_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast P.n.zero_le) |>.mpr (by exact_mod_cast P.hL))
              exact Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by exact_mod_cast (pos_of_gt P.hL)))) hp)) (by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos)
      rw [Multiset.filter_congr this, sum_map_iff_predicate (fun m ↦ m.factorization p = 1) (fun m ↦ 0 < m ∧ p ∣ m)]
      · simp [count_join, sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul, ← Finset.card_filter, filter_and]
      · intro m hm h; exact Prime.factorization_eq_one_of_dvd_of_not_dvd_sq hprime h.2
          (fun hsq ↦ (lt_asymm (show (m:ℝ) < P.n by simp only [mem_join, mem_replicate, mem_Ico] at hm; exact_mod_cast hm.1.2)
          (by rw [← Real.sqrt_lt_self_iff (by exact_mod_cast P.n.zero_le), ← pow_two] at hp';
              exact lt_of_lt_of_le hp' (Nat.cast_le.mpr (le_of_dvd h.1 hsq)))))
    have h_card : (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).filter (fun m ↦ 0 < m ∧ p ∣ m) |>.card ≥ (P.n / P.M) / p := by
      let s := (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).filter (fun m ↦ 0 < m ∧ p ∣ m)
      have : s.card = (P.n - 1) / p - (P.n - P.n / P.M - 1) / p := by
        let A := P.n - P.n / P.M
        have h_bij : s ≃ Finset.Ico ((A + p - 1) / p) ((P.n - 1) / p + 1) := by
          refine Equiv.ofBijective (fun m ↦ ⟨m / p, ?_⟩) ⟨fun x y h ↦ ?_, fun k ↦ ?_⟩
          · simp only [s, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Ico] at m
            simp only [Finset.mem_Ico]; rw [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le hprime.pos, Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul hprime.pos]
            constructor
            · exact le_trans (Nat.le_add_right _ _) (Nat.add_le_of_le_sub hprime.pos (le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt m.1.1) m.2) m.1.1)
            · exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt m.1.1) m.2) (Nat.lt_succ.mp m.1.2)
          · apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left hprime.pos; simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at h; rwa [Nat.div_exact (by simp [s] at x; exact x.2.2), Nat.div_exact (by simp [s] at y; exact y.2.2)] at h
          · simp only [Finset.mem_Ico] at k
            refine ⟨⟨k * p, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
            · simp only [s, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Ico]
              constructor
              · constructor
                · rw [← Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le hprime.pos] at k; exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (le_trans k.1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _))
                · rw [← Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul hprime.pos] at k; exact Nat.lt_succ.1 k.2
              · exact ⟨(mul_pos hprime.pos (pos_of_gt k.1)).trans_le (le_add_right _ _), dvd_mul_right _ _⟩
            · simp [Nat.mul_div_cancel _ hprime.pos]
        rw [Finset.card_congr (fun x _ ↦ x) (by simp) (fun _ _ _ _ ↦ id) (fun y hy ↦ ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩)] -- simplify equiv usage
        rw [Finset.card_eq_card_map_of_injective _ (Function.Injective.of_comp h_bij.injective)]
        simp only [Finset.map_refl, h_bij.range_eq_univ, Finset.card_Ico]
        omega
      rw [this]
      refine (Nat.div_sub_div_le_div_sub (P.n - 1) (P.n - P.n / P.M - 1) p).trans_eq ?_ |>.ge
      congr; omega
    have h_ineq : P.n / p ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) + P.M := by
      rw [Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul, mul_comm p]
      exact (Nat.div_le_mul_div_add_mul _ _ _).trans (by omega)
    rw [Factorization.balance, hsum, factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp', ge_iff_le,
      neg_le_sub_iff_le_add]
    calc P.n / p ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) + P.M := h_ineq
      _ ≤ P.M * (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).filter (fun m ↦ 0 < m ∧ p ∣ m) |>.card + P.M :=
        add_le_add_right (mul_le_mul_left' h_card _) _
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum,
      Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]; omega

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have h_subset : Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n) ⊆
        Finset.filter (fun m ↦ m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n) := by
      intro m hm
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Ico] at hm
      rw [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Ico, and_iff_right hm.1]
      by_contra h_not_smooth
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers] at h_not_smooth
      push_neg at h_not_smooth
      obtain ⟨q, hq_prime, hq_dvd, hq_large⟩ := h_not_smooth hm.1.1
      have hp_le : p ≤ P.n / P.L := hp
      have h_ne : p ≠ q := ne_of_lt (hp_le.trans_lt hq_large)
      have h_mul_dvd : p * q ∣ m := hprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd_of_ne_prime hq_prime hm.2 hq_dvd h_ne
      have h_bound : p * q > P.n := by
        have hL_lt_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n :=
          Real.lt_sqrt_of_sq_lt (cast_lt.mpr P.hL)
        have hn_L_gt_sqrt : (P.n / P.L : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n := by
          rw [gt_iff_lt, lt_div_iff₀ (cast_pos.mpr P.hL_pos)]
          calc (P.L : ℝ) * Real.sqrt P.n < Real.sqrt P.n * Real.sqrt P.n :=
              mul_lt_mul_right (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (cast_pos.mpr (pos_of_gt P.hL))) |>.mpr hL_lt_sqrt
            _ = P.n := Real.mul_self_sqrt (cast_nonneg _)
        calc (p * q : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n * (P.n / P.L) :=
            mul_lt_mul hp' (cast_lt.mpr hq_large) (cast_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _)
          _ = (P.n / P.L : ℝ) * Real.sqrt P.n := mul_comm _ _
          _ > Real.sqrt P.n * Real.sqrt P.n :=
            mul_lt_mul_left (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (cast_pos.mpr (pos_of_gt P.hL))) |>.mpr hn_L_gt_sqrt
          _ = P.n := Real.mul_self_sqrt (cast_nonneg _)
      norm_cast at h_bound
      linarith [hm.1.2]

    have h_sum_le : P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by
      simp only [Params.initial, Factorization.sum, map_join, sum_join, map_replicate,
        sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul]
      rw [← sum_eq_multiset_sum]
      have h_card : (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card ≥ (P.n / P.M) / p := by
        let A := P.n - P.n / P.M
        let B := P.n
        have h_count : (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico A B)).card = (B - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p := by
          convert card_filter_dvd_Ico A B p hprime.pos
          · simp [A, B]; omega
          · simp [A, B]; omega
        rw [h_count]
        have h_split : B - 1 = (A - 1) + P.n / P.M := by
          have : P.n / P.M ≤ P.n := Nat.div_le_self _ _
          omega
        rw [h_split]
        exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (Nat.add_div_le_add_div _ _ _)

      calc P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
            mul_le_mul_left _ h_card
        _ ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (fun m ↦ m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)
              (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n) |>.filter (p ∣ ·)).card := by
            refine mul_le_mul_left _ <| card_le_card fun m hm ↦ ?_
            rw [Finset.mem_filter] at hm ⊢
            exact ⟨h_subset hm, hm.2⟩
        _ = _ := by
            rw [Finset.sum_filter]
            refine congrArg _ (Finset.sum_congr rfl fun m hm ↦ ?_)
            rw [if_pos (Finset.mem_filter.mp hm).2]
            refine factorization_eq_div_of_lt hprime ?_
            calc m < P.n := (Finset.mem_filter.mp hm).1.1.2
              _ < p * p := by
                 rw [← Real.sqrt_lt (cast_nonneg _) (cast_nonneg _), Real.sqrt_mul (cast_nonneg _)]
                 exact mul_self_lt_mul_self (Real.sqrt_nonneg _) hp'

    have h_arith : P.n / p ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) + P.M := by
      let q := P.n / P.M
      let r := P.n % P.M
      have hn : P.n = q * P.M + r := (Nat.div_add_mod P.n P.M).symm
      have hr : r < P.M := Nat.mod_lt _ (pos_of_mul_pos_right (pos_of_gt P.hL) P.hL.le)
      rw [hn]
      calc (q * P.M + r) / p ≤ (q * P.M + (P.M - 1)) / p := by
             apply Nat.div_le_div_right
             omega
         _ = (P.M * q + (P.M - 1)) / p := by ring_nf
         _ ≤ P.M * q / p + P.M := by
             let k := q / p
             let s := q % p
             have hq : q = k * p + s := (Nat.div_add_mod q p).symm
             rw [hq]
             have hs : s < p := Nat.mod_lt _ hprime.pos
             rw [add_mul, mul_assoc, add_assoc, Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ hprime.pos]
             apply Nat.add_le_add_left
             calc (s * P.M + (P.M - 1)) / p ≤ ( (p - 1) * P.M + (P.M - 1) ) / p := by
                  apply Nat.div_le_div_right
                  nlinarith
               _ = (p * P.M - 1) / p := by
                  congr; ring_nf; omega
               _ < P.M := by
                  rw [Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul hprime.pos]
                  omega

    rw [Factorization.balance, factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp', sub_ge_iff_le_add,
        neg_add_eq_sub, le_sub_iff_add_le]
    calc P.n / p ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) + P.M := h_arith
       _ ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum + P.M := Nat.add_le_add_right h_sum_le _

  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime, factorial_factorization_eq_div]
    omega

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hM : P.M > 0 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by
      simp only [h, Nat.div_zero, tsub_zero, Params.initial, Multiset.replicate_zero,
        Multiset.join_zero, Multiset.filter_zero, Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum,
        Multiset.map_zero, Multiset.sum_zero, zero_sub, neg_le_neg_iff, zero_le] at *
      have : P.n < p := by
        calc P.n = P.n / 1 := (Nat.div_one P.n).symm
          _ < P.n / (P.n : ℝ).sqrt := by
            rw [div_lt_div_iff_of_pos_left (by exact_mod_cast (pos_of_gt P.hL)) zero_lt_one]
            exact Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg P.n) |>.mpr (by exact_mod_cast (pos_of_gt P.hL))
          _ < p := hp'
      exact not_le_of_gt this (hp.trans (Nat.div_le_self P.n P.L))

    rw [Params.initial.factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp']
    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm hpm ↦ by
      by_contra h_not_smooth
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers] at h_not_smooth; push_neg at h_not_smooth
      rcases h_not_smooth m.pos_of_ne_zero (pos_of_mem_Ico hm).ne' with ⟨q, _, hq_dvd, hq_large⟩
      have h_mq : m ≥ p * q := Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_mem_Ico hm) (mul_dvd_mul hpm hq_dvd)
      have h_bound : (p : ℝ) * q > P.n := by
        have h_sqrt : (P.n : ℝ).sqrt > P.L := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_lt_iff_sq_lt] <;> try positivity
          exact_mod_cast P.hL
        have h_q : (q : ℝ) > (P.n : ℝ).sqrt := calc
          (q : ℝ) > P.n / P.L := Nat.cast_lt.mpr hq_large
          _ ≥ P.n / (P.n : ℝ).sqrt := div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (Nat.cast_nonneg P.n) h_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos) (Real.le_sqrt_of_sq_le (le_of_eq (Real.sq_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg P.n)).symm))
          _ = (P.n : ℝ).sqrt := by rw [div_sqrt]
        calc (p : ℝ) * q > (P.n : ℝ).sqrt * (P.n : ℝ).sqrt := mul_lt_mul hp' h_q (Real.sqrt_nonneg P.n) (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le p))
             _ = P.n := Real.mul_self_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg P.n)
      exact not_lt_of_ge h_mq (Nat.cast_lt.mp h_bound)

    have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum = P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card := by
      simp only [Params.initial, Multiset.mem_filter, Multiset.mem_join, Multiset.mem_replicate]
      rw [Multiset.sum_map_filter, sum_join, map_replicate, sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul]
      congr 1
      convert sum_map_mul_right.symm using 1; simp
      refine sum_congr rfl fun m hm ↦ ?_
      split_ifs with hpm
      · have : m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := h_smooth m hm hpm
        simp only [this, ↓reduceIte]
        refine Nat.dvd_iff_one_le_factorization (pos_of_mem_Ico hm).ne' hprime |>.mp hpm |>.antisymm ?_
        by_contra h_ge_2; rw [not_le] at h_ge_2
        have : p^2 ∣ m := (pow_dvd_pow p h_ge_2).trans (Nat.dvd_of_factorization_pos (pos_of_mem_Ico hm).ne' (by linarith))
        have : (p^2 : ℝ) ≤ m := Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_mem_Ico hm) this)
        have : (p : ℝ)^2 > P.n := by rw [Real.sq]; nlinarith
        linarith [mem_Ico.mp hm]
      · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_dvd hpm]

    rw [h_sum, ge_iff_le, le_sub_iff_add_le, ← Nat.cast_add, ← Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_le]
    set A := P.n - P.n / P.M
    rw [card_filter_dvd_Ico_eq_div_sub_div _ _ hprime.pos]
    apply le_trans (b := P.M * ((P.n - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p + 1))
    · have : P.n / p ≤ (P.n - 1) / p + 1 := by
        cases P.n; simp; rw [Nat.succ_sub_one, Nat.succ_div]; split_ifs; exact le_rfl; exact Nat.le_succ _
      exact this.trans <| Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ hM
    · rw [Nat.mul_add, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.sub_add_eq_add_sub (Nat.mul_div_le_mul _ _)]
      refine Nat.le_sub_of_add_le ?_
      rw [← Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib]
      have hMA : P.M * (A - 1) ≤ (P.M - 1) * P.n := by
        calc P.M * (A - 1) ≤ P.M * A := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ (Nat.sub_le _ _)
          _ = P.M * (P.n - P.n / P.M) := rfl
          _ = P.M * P.n - P.M * (P.n / P.M) := Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib _ _ _
          _ = P.M * P.n - (P.n - P.n % P.M) := by rw [Nat.mul_div_cancel' (Nat.mod_lt _ hM).le]
          _ ≤ P.M * P.n - (P.n - P.M) := Nat.sub_le_sub_left (Nat.sub_le_sub_left (le_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ hM)) _) _
          _ = (P.M - 1) * P.n + P.M := by
            rw [Nat.sub_one_mul, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ hM)];
            refine (Nat.sub_eq_of_eq_add ?_).symm
            rw [add_assoc, add_comm P.M, ← Nat.sub_add_eq_add_sub (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ hM), Nat.add_sub_cancel]
          _ = (P.M - 1) * P.n + P.M := rfl -- wait, logic above is imprecise but bound holds
        -- Re-evaluate bound simply:
        -- P.M * (A - 1) <= P.M * A - P.M = P.M * n - (n - n%M) - P.M <= P.M * n - n + M + P.M?? No.
        -- P.M * A = P.M * n - (P.n - P.n % P.M).
        -- = (P.M - 1) n + n % P.M.
        -- P.M * (A - 1) = (P.M - 1) n + n % P.M - P.M.
        -- Since n % P.M < P.M, this is <= (P.M - 1) n.
        calc P.M * (A - 1) = P.M * A - P.M := Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib _ _ _
          _ = P.M * P.n - (P.n - P.n % P.M) - P.M := by rw [Nat.mul_div_cancel' (Nat.mod_lt _ hM).le]
          _ = P.M * P.n - P.n + P.n % P.M - P.M := by rw [Nat.sub_sub, Nat.sub_add_eq_add_sub (Nat.div_mul_le_self P.n P.M)]
          _ = (P.M - 1) * P.n + P.n % P.M - P.M := by rw [Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib, one_mul]
          _ ≤ (P.M - 1) * P.n := Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add.mpr (Nat.add_le_add_left (le_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ hM)) _)
      calc P.M * ((A - 1) / p) ≤ (P.M * (A - 1)) / p := Nat.mul_div_le _ _ _
        _ ≤ ((P.M - 1) * P.n) / p := Nat.div_le_div_right hMA
        _ ≤ (P.M - 1) * ((P.n - 1) / p + 1) := by
          rw [Nat.mul_add, mul_one]; apply Nat.le_add_of_sub_le
          rw [← Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib]; exact Nat.div_mul_le_div_mul _ _ _
        _ = P.M * ((P.n - 1) / p + 1) - ((P.n - 1) / p + 1) := by rw [Nat.sub_one_mul]
        _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n - 1) / p + 1) - (P.n / p) := Nat.sub_le_sub_left (by

          · exact (Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul hprime.pos).mp hx.2 |>.trans_le (by omega)

  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime]; linarith

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have h_sqrt_n_lt_p : Real.sqrt P.n < p := hp'
    have h_n_pos : 0 < P.n := by
      have := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
      exact_mod_cast this
    have hM : 0 < P.M := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by
      simp only [h, zero_mul, Nat.div_zero, sub_zero] at *
      -- If M=0, n/M=0, Ico n n empty. balance = - n/p.
      -- Goal: - n/p >= 0 => n/p = 0 => n < p.
      -- Premises: p <= n/L <= n.
      -- So n < n. False.
      have : p ≤ P.n := hp.trans (Nat.div_le_self _ _)
      have : P.n < p := Nat.lt_of_div_eq_zero (le_antisymm (by simpa using hp) (Nat.zero_le _))
      linarith
    have h_p_pos : 0 < p := hprime.pos
    
    rw [factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp']
    
    let S := (replicate P.M (Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join
    have h_sum_eq : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum = (S.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by
      have : P.initial.a = S.filter (fun m ↦ m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers) := rfl
      rw [this, Multiset.sum_map_filter]
      intro m hm
      simp only [mem_join, mem_replicate, mem_Ico] at hm
      obtain ⟨_, ⟨_, rfl⟩, h_le, h_lt⟩ := hm
      intro hpm
      rw [if_pos]
      have hm_pos : 0 < m := pos_of_gt h_le
      have h_m_div_p : m / p < P.n / P.L := by
        calc m / p < P.n / p := Nat.div_lt_div_of_lt_of_dvd hpm h_lt h_p_pos
          _ < Real.sqrt P.n := by
            rw [Nat.cast_lt, lt_div_iff_mul_lt hprime.pos]
            rw [← Real.sqrt_lt, Real.sqrt_mul, Real.sqrt_mul_self (Nat.cast_nonneg _)] at h_sqrt_n_lt_p
            exact_mod_cast h_sqrt_n_lt_p
          _ < P.n / P.L := by
             rw [Real.lt_div_iff₀ (Nat.cast_pos.mpr P.hL_pos)]
             have : (P.L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := by
               rw [Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)]; exact_mod_cast by nlinarith [P.hL]
             calc (P.L : ℝ) * Real.sqrt P.n < Real.sqrt P.n * Real.sqrt P.n := by gcongr
               _ = P.n := Real.mul_self_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
      have h_k_smooth : (m / p) ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := by
        rw [mem_smoothNumbers]
        exact ⟨pos_of_mul_pos_right (by rw [← Nat.div_mul_cancel hpm]; exact hm_pos) hprime.zero_le,
          fun q hq hq_div ↦ (Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_mul_pos_right (by rw [← Nat.div_mul_cancel hpm]; exact hm_pos) hprime.zero_le) hq_div).trans (le_of_lt h_m_div_p)⟩
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers]
      constructor
      · exact hm_pos
      · intro q hq hq_div
        obtain rfl | hq_dvd_k := hprime.dvd_or_dvd (hq_div.trans (Nat.div_mul_cancel hpm).symm.dvd)
        · exact hp
        · exact (mem_smoothNumbers.mp h_k_smooth).2 q hq hq_dvd_k
    
    rw [h_sum_eq]
    
    have h_val_one : ∀ m ∈ S, m.factorization p = if p ∣ m then 1 else 0 := fun m hm ↦ by
      simp only [mem_join, mem_replicate, mem_Ico] at hm
      obtain ⟨_, ⟨_, rfl⟩, _, h_lt⟩ := hm
      split_ifs with hpm
      · rw [Nat.factorization_eq_one_iff_dvd_and_not_dvd_sq hprime.ne_zero hpm]
        intro h_sq
        have : p * p ≤ m := Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt hm.1) h_sq
        have : (p : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast this
        have : (p : ℝ) ^ 2 > P.n := by rw [← Real.sqrt_lt, Real.sqrt_sq (Nat.cast_nonneg _)] at hp'; exact_mod_cast hp'
        linarith
      · exact Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_dvd hpm
      
    rw [Multiset.sum_map_congr rfl h_val_one]
    simp only [Multiset.map_ite, Multiset.map_const, Multiset.sum_map_add, Multiset.sum_replicate,
      Multiset.sum_zero, add_zero, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one, mul_zero]
    
    let count := (S.filter (p ∣ ·)).card
    have h_count_eq : (S.map (fun x ↦ if p ∣ x then 1 else 0)).sum = count := by
      rw [sum_map, ← Multiset.filter_congr (fun _ _ ↦ Iff.rfl)]
      simp only [ite_one_zero_congr, map_const, sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul, mul_one]
      rfl

    have h_card : count = P.M * (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).filter (p ∣ ·) |>.card := by
      simp [S, count, Multiset.card_join, map_replicate, sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul,
        Multiset.filter_bind, Multiset.bind_replicate]
      congr
      
    rw [h_count_eq, h_card]
    
    let c := (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).filter (p ∣ ·) |>.card
    have h_count_ge : c ≥ P.n / P.M / p := by
      have h_len : P.n - (P.n - P.n / P.M) = P.n / P.M := Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.div_le_self P.n P.M)
      rw [← h_len]
      let A := P.n - P.n / P.M
      let B := P.n
      change (Finset.Ico A B).filter (p ∣ ·) |>.card ≥ (B - A) / p

        simp only [X, A, B]
        omega
      rw [hB]
      exact Nat.div_add_div_le_add_div _ _ _

    norm_cast
    apply Nat.div_le_of_le_mul
    calc P.n = P.M * (P.n / P.M) + P.n % P.M := (Nat.div_add_mod P.n P.M).symm
        _ < P.M * (P.n / P.M) + P.M := by gcongr; exact Nat.mod_lt _ hM
        _ = P.M * (P.n / P.M + 1) := by ring
        _ ≤ P.M * (p * ((P.n / P.M) / p + 1)) := by
             gcongr
             exact Nat.lt_mul_div_succ _ hprime.pos
        _ = P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p + 1) * p := by ring
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
    exact (neg_le_self_iff.mpr (Nat.cast_nonneg P.M)).trans (le_of_eq rfl)

by_cases hprime : p.Prime; swap

  have h_val_eq : ∀ m ∈ Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n, m.factorization p = if p ∣ m then 1 else 0 := fun m hm ↦ by

    rw [mem_smoothNumbers]; refine ⟨pos_of_gt (by linarith [Multiset.mem_Ico.mp hm |>.1]), fun q hq hqm ↦ ?_⟩
    rcases hpm with ⟨k, rfl⟩; rcases hqm with rfl | hqk

    · have : k < P.n / P.L := by

  have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum = P.M * (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).filter (p ∣ ·) |>.card := by
    rw [Params.initial, Multiset.sum_map_filter]
    trans (replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join.map (fun m ↦ if p ∣ m then 1 else 0) |>.sum
    · refine Multiset.sum_map_congr (fun m hm ↦ ?_)
      split_ifs with h
      · rw [h_val_eq _ (Multiset.mem_of_mem_join hm), if_pos h, if_pos (h_smooth _ (Multiset.mem_of_mem_join hm) h)]
      · rw [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_dvd h]
    · simp [Multiset.map_join, Multiset.sum_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate,
        Multiset.map_const, Multiset.sum_map_mul_left, Finset.card, Multiset.sum_boole]

  let C := (Finset.Ico A P.n).filter (p ∣ ·) |>.card

    rw [← Nat.card_Ico_dvd hprime.ne_zero, ← Finset.card_union_of_disjoint (Finset.Ico_disjoint_Ico_consecutive (Nat.zero_le _) (Nat.sub_le _ _))]
    congr; rw [Finset.Ico_union_Ico_eq_Ico (Nat.one_le_of_lt (Nat.pos_of_gt P.hL_pos)) (Nat.sub_le _ _), Nat.Ico_succ_right]

  refine add_le_add_right ?_ _
  have h_rest_le : C_rest ≤ (P.M - 1) * (C + 1) + (P.M - 1) := by
    have hC : C ≥ (P.n / P.M) / p - 1 := by
      rw [← Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add]; refine (Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le hprime.pos).mp ?_
      calc p * ((P.n / P.M) / p) ≤ P.n / P.M := Nat.mul_div_le _ _
        _ = P.n - A := Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.div_le_self _ _) |>.symm
        _ ≤ p * C + p := by
          rw [← Nat.add_one_le_iff]
          convert (Finset.Ico A P.n).card_filter_dvd_le_add_card_filter_dvd hprime.ne_zero
          rw [Nat.card_Ico_dvd hprime.ne_zero, Nat.div_one]

      calc A / p ≤ A / p + (P.n % P.M) / p := Nat.le_add_right _ _
        _ = ((P.M - 1) * (P.n / P.M) + (P.n % P.M) + (P.n % P.M)) / p := by
          congr 1; rw [Nat.sub_mul_div _ _ (Nat.pos_of_gt P.hL_pos)]
        _ ≤ (P.M - 1) * ((P.n / P.M) / p + 1) := by
          rw [add_assoc]; trans ((P.M - 1) * (P.n / P.M) + (P.M - 1) * p + p) / p
          · refine Nat.div_le_div_right (Nat.add_le_add_left ?_ _)
            calc P.n % P.M + P.n % P.M < P.M + P.M := Nat.add_lt_add (Nat.mod_lt _ (Nat.pos_of_gt P.hL_pos)) (Nat.mod_lt _ (Nat.pos_of_gt P.hL_pos))

                rcases eq_or_ne P.M 0 with rfl | hM; · contradiction
                rcases eq_or_ne P.M 1 with rfl | hM'; · simp [hprime.one_lt.le]
                rw [tsub_mul, one_mul, Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.zero_le _) hprime.one_lt.le)]; nlinarith [hprime.one_lt]

      _ ≤ (P.M - 1) * (C + 2) := by
        trans (P.M - 1) * ((P.n / P.M) / p + 1)
        · exact hA
        · exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ (by omega)
      _ ≤ (P.M - 1) * C + (P.M - 1) + (P.M - 1) := by rw [mul_add]; omega
  omega

    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm hdvd ↦ by

    rw [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp', h_val, ge_iff_le, neg_le_sub_iff_le_add]
    calc P.n / p ≤ P.M * (k / p) + P.M := by
           rw [k, Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul]
           exact Nat.div_le_mul_add_mod (P.n / p) P.M |>.trans (add_le_add_left (le_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ (by have := P.hL; have := P.hL_pos; nlinarith))) _)
         _ ≤ P.M * ((I.filter (fun m ↦ p ∣ m ∧ m ≠ 0)).card + 1) + P.M := by
           gcongr; rw [le_add_iff_nonneg_right]; exact Nat.zero_le _
           exact Nat.le_add_of_sub_le h_card
         _ = P.M * (I.filter (fun m ↦ p ∣ m ∧ m ≠ 0)).card + 2 * P.M := by ring
         _ = P.M * (I.filter (fun m ↦ p ∣ m ∧ m ≠ 0)).card + P.M + P.M := by ring
    linarith
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · rw [Params.initial.factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp']
    let K := P.n / P.M
    let A := P.n - K
    let I := Finset.Ico A P.n
    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ I, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm_mem h_div ↦ by
      rw [Multiset.mem_Ico] at hm_mem
      have hm_pos : 0 < m := by
        refine pos_of_gt <| lt_of_le_of_lt (Real.le_sqrt_of_div_le ?_) hp'
        rw [div_le_iff₀ (by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos), mul_comm]
        exact_mod_cast Nat.div_mul_le_self m p ▸ Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt hm_mem.1) h_div
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers, Nat.support_eq_factors]
      intro q hq
      rcases (Nat.mem_factors hm_pos.ne').mp hq with ⟨_, hq_dvd⟩
      rcases hprime.dvd_or_dvd (hq_dvd.trans h_div) with rfl | h_div_div
      · exact hp
      · have : m / p < Real.sqrt P.n := by
           rw [div_lt_iff₀ (by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos), mul_comm]
           exact lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.cast_le.mpr hm_mem.2.le) (lt_mul_of_div_lt (by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos) hp')
        exact le_trans (Nat.cast_le.mp <| le_trans (Nat.cast_le.mpr <| Nat.le_of_dvd
          (Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd hm_pos h_div) hprime.pos) hq_dvd) this.le)
          (by rw [← Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg P.n)] at hp'; exact_mod_cast le_trans hp.le (le_of_lt hp'))

    have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum = P.M * ((P.n - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p) := by
      simp only [Params.initial, Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.filter_filter,
        Multiset.map_join, Multiset.sum_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate,
        Multiset.card_filter, nsmul_eq_mul]
      rw [Multiset.filter_eq_self.mpr]
      · congr 1
        rw [Multiset.Ico, Multiset.card_filter, Finset.card_Ico_filter_dvd_eq_card_Ico_div_sub_div hprime.pos]
        rfl -- The ranges match precisely as A and n are naturals
      · intro m hm; simp only [Multiset.mem_join, Multiset.mem_replicate, Multiset.mem_Ico] at hm
        obtain ⟨_, ⟨_, rfl⟩, hm⟩ := hm
        rw [factorization_eq_zero_iff]
        rintro h_div
        rw [if_pos (.inr (.inl h_div))]
        have : m.factorization p = 1 := by
           refine Nat.dvd_iff_one_le_factorization (pos_of_gt hm.1).ne' |>.mpr h_div |>.antisymm ?_
           by_contra hc
           have : (p^2 : ℝ) ≤ m := Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt hm.1) (Nat.pow_dvd_of_le_factorization (by omega)))
           linarith [hm.2, Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg P.n) |>.mp hp']
        simp [this, h_smooth m (by simpa [Multiset.Ico] using hm) h_div]

    have h_bound : (P.n - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p ≥ K / p := by
      have : (A - 1) / p + K / p ≤ (A - 1 + K) / p := Nat.div_add_div_le (A-1) K p
      have : A - 1 + K = P.n - 1 := by
        dsimp [A, K]; rw [Nat.sub_add_comm (Nat.div_le_self _ _)]; congr; exact Nat.add_sub_cancel _ _
      rwa [this, Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le (Nat.div_le_div_left (by dsimp [A, K]; omega) _)]

    rw [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, h_sum, ge_iff_le, neg_le_sub_iff_le_add,
        add_comm, ← sub_le_iff_le_add, Int.ofNat_sub (Nat.div_mul_le_self _ _)]
    apply Int.ofNat_le.mpr
    apply le_trans ?_ (Nat.mul_le_mul_left P.M h_bound)
    rw [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le p hprime.pos, mul_comm, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib,
      tsub_le_iff_right, mul_assoc]
    let R := P.n % P.M
    have hn : P.n = P.M * K + R := Nat.div_add_mod P.n P.M
    let q := K / p
    let r := K % p
    have hK : K = q * p + r := Nat.div_add_mod K p
    rw [hn, hK, mul_add, mul_add, add_assoc, Nat.add_div_right _ hprime.pos]
    calc P.M * (q * p + r) + R
       ≤ P.M * q * p + P.M * p + P.M * q * p := by
          refine add_le_add_left ?_ _
          calc P.M * r + R
             ≤ P.M * (p - 1) + (P.M - 1) := by
                gcongr <;> apply Nat.le_pred_of_lt <;> [exact Nat.mod_lt _ hprime.pos, exact Nat.mod_lt _ (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp P.M.pos_iff_ne_zero)]
           _ = P.M * p - 1 := by rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, mul_one]; omega
           _ < P.M * p := Nat.sub_lt (mul_pos (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp P.M.pos_iff_ne_zero) hprime.pos) zero_lt_one
           _ ≤ P.M * p + (P.M * (K / p) * p) / p * p := by
              rw [Nat.div_mul_le_iff_dvd_of_div_eq_mul (dvd_mul_right _ _)]
              · exact Nat.le_add_right _ _
              · apply dvd_mul_right
    
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime p hprime]

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hsqrt : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n := hp'
    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm hpm ↦ by
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers]
      refine ⟨by rw [Multiset.mem_Ico] at hm; omega, fun q hq hqm ↦ ?_⟩
      by_cases hqp : q = p
      · rw [hqp]; exact hp
      · have : m / p < Real.sqrt P.n := by
          rw [Multiset.mem_Ico] at hm
          apply (div_lt_iff_lt_mul (by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos)).mpr
          calc (m : ℝ) < P.n := by exact_mod_cast hm.2
            _ = (Real.sqrt P.n)^2 := (Real.mul_self_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)).symm
            _ < (Real.sqrt P.n) * p := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hsqrt (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by exact_mod_cast P.hL.trans_le (Nat.le_add_left _ _)))
        have : q ≤ m / p := le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt this) (dvd_div_of_mul_dvd (mul_comm p q ▸ hqm) hqp)
        exact_mod_cast (Nat.cast_le.mpr this).trans_lt (this.trans_lt (by
          rw [Real.sqrt_lt (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (Nat.cast_nonneg _), Nat.div_mul_le_iff (pos_of_gt P.hL_pos) P.n] at hp
          rw [div_lt_iff₀' (by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos), ← Real.sqrt_lt (by exact_mod_cast (pos_of_gt P.hL).le) (Nat.cast_nonneg _)]
          have := P.hL; nlinarith))
    have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum =
        P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card := by
      rw [Factorization.sum, Params.initial, map_filter]
      rw [show (filter (fun x ↦ x.factorization p ≠ 0) ((map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)) _)) =
          map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p) (filter (fun m ↦ m.factorization p ≠ 0) _) from Multiset.filter_map _ _ _]
      rw [Multiset.sum_map_mul_left, Multiset.sum_map_one]
      · rw [Multiset.count_eq_card_filter_eq]
        congr 1; ext m
        simp only [Multiset.mem_filter, Multiset.mem_join, Multiset.mem_replicate, Multiset.mem_Ico, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Ico]
        constructor
        · rintro ⟨⟨_, ⟨_, rfl⟩, hm⟩, hfact⟩
          have hpm : p ∣ m := hprime.dvd_iff_one_le_factorization (by omega) |>.mpr (by omega)
          simp [hm, hpm]
        · rintro ⟨hm, hpm⟩
          have : m.factorization p = 1 := hprime.factorization_eq_one_of_dvd_of_not_dvd_sq hpm fun hsq ↦
            (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_of_dvd (by omega) hsq) (by exact_mod_cast (pow_lt_pow_left hsqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num) : (p^2 : ℝ) > P.n))).not_le (by exact_mod_cast hm.2)
          simp [h_smooth m hm hpm, this, hm]
      · intro x hx; simp only [Multiset.mem_filter, Multiset.mem_join, Multiset.mem_replicate, Multiset.mem_Ico] at hx
        obtain ⟨_, _, hfact⟩ := hx
        exact hprime.factorization_eq_one_of_dvd_of_not_dvd_sq (hprime.dvd_iff_one_le_factorization (by omega) |>.mpr hfact) fun hsq ↦
             (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_of_dvd (by omega) hsq) (by exact_mod_cast (pow_lt_pow_left hsqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num) : (p^2 : ℝ) > P.n))).not_le (by exact_mod_cast hx.1.2.2)
    rw [Factorization.balance, h_sum, factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hsqrt]
    rw [ge_iff_le, neg_le_sub_iff_le_add, ← le_sub_iff_add_le, Nat.cast_mul]
    set A := P.n - P.n / P.M
    have h_card : (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico A P.n)).card = (P.n - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p := by
      rw [Finset.card_filter, Finset.card_Ico, Nat.count_dvd_eq_div, Nat.count_dvd_eq_div] <;> try exact hprime.pos
      rw [tsub_tsub]; congr 1; omega
    rw [h_card]
    rcases eq_or_lt_of_le (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp P.M.pos_of_ne_zero) with hM | hM
    · rw [← hM] at *; simp at *
      rw [Nat.div_one, Nat.sub_self] at h_card ⊢
      norm_cast; apply le_trans (Nat.div_le_div_right (Nat.le_pred_of_lt (pos_of_gt P.hL.le)))
      omega
    · have hA : 1 ≤ A := by
        rw [show A = P.n - P.n / P.M from rfl, Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le (Nat.div_le_self _ _)]
        nth_rw 1 [← Nat.one_mul P.n]
        apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
        rwa [Nat.add_le_add_iff_right, Nat.div_le_iff_le_mul_add_pred (by omega), one_mul, Nat.add_comm]
      have h_card_ge : (P.n - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p ≥ (P.n / P.M) / p := by
        rw [show P.n / P.M = P.n - 1 - (A - 1) by simp [A]; rw [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.div_mul_le_self _ _)]; omega]
        apply Nat.div_add_div_le
      calc (P.n / p : ℤ) ≤ (P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) + P.M : ℕ) := by
             norm_cast; rw [Nat.div_eq (P.n / P.M) p, mul_add, mul_comm p, ← mul_assoc, mul_comm p]
             apply add_le_add_left
             apply (Nat.div_le_div_right (Nat.div_mul_le_self P.n P.M).trans_le).trans
             apply le_trans (Nat.mod_lt _ hprime.pos).le
             apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ (pos_of_gt P.hL_pos)
           _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p) + P.M := by gcongr
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime]

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hsum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum =
        P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card := by
      rw [sum_eq_multiset_sum, Multiset.sum_map_mul_right, Multiset.sum_map_mul_right,
        Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]
      refine congrArg _ ?_
      rw [sum_map_join_map, sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]
      unfold Params.initial
      rw [sum_map_filter]
      have h_val : ∀ m ∈ (replicate P.M (Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join,
          m.factorization p = if p ∣ m then 1 else 0 := fun m hm ↦ by
        simp only [mem_join, mem_replicate, mem_Ico] at hm
        obtain ⟨_, ⟨_, rfl⟩, hmn⟩ := hm
        by_cases h_dvd : p ∣ m
        · rw [if_pos h_dvd, Nat.Prime.factorization_eq_one_of_dvd_of_pow_not_dvd hprime h_dvd]
          rw [pow_two]
          apply not_dvd_of_between_consec_multiples (k:=0)
          simp only [mul_zero, zero_add, mul_one]
          have : (m : ℝ) < p ^ 2 := by
            calc (m : ℝ) < P.n := Nat.cast_lt.mpr hmn.2
              _ < p ^ 2 := Real.lt_pow_of_sqrt_lt hp'
          norm_cast at this
          exact ⟨pos_of_dvd_of_pos h_dvd (pos_of_ne_zero (pos_of_gt hmn.1).ne'), this⟩
        · rw [if_neg h_dvd, factorization_eq_zero_of_not_dvd h_dvd]
      have h_keep : ∀ m ∈ (replicate P.M (Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join,
          p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm h_dvd ↦ by
        simp only [mem_join, mem_replicate, mem_Ico] at hm
        obtain ⟨_, ⟨_, rfl⟩, hmn⟩ := hm
        refine mem_smoothNumbers.mpr ⟨pos_of_gt hmn.1, fun q hq hq_dvd ↦ ?_⟩
        by_cases hqp : q = p
        · rw [hqp]; exact hp
        · have : m / p < P.n / P.L := by
            apply (Nat.div_lt_div_iff_of_mul_lt_mul (by exact_mod_cast hp' : (0:ℝ) < p)
              (by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos : 0 < p)).mpr
            calc (m : ℝ) < P.n := Nat.cast_lt.mpr hmn.2
              _ < p * (P.n / P.L) := by
                rw [mul_comm]
                apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by exact_mod_cast hp')
                calc Real.sqrt P.n ≤ P.n / P.L := by
                  rw [le_div_iff₀' (by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos), ← le_div_iff₀' (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by exact_mod_cast P.hL.trans_le (le_add_self))))
                  rw [div_sqrt, Real.le_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)]
                  exact_mod_cast P.hL.le
          apply le_of_lt
          refine (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt hmn.1) h_dvd) hprime.pos)
            (dvd_div_of_mul_dvd ?_)).trans_lt this
          rw [mul_comm]; exact (hprime.coprime_iff_not_dvd.mpr hqp).mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h_dvd hq_dvd
      rw [sum_congr rfl (fun x hx ↦ h_val x hx)]
      rw [sum_map_if]
      simp only [map_const, sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul, mul_one, sum_zero, add_zero]
      rw [filter_filter]
      rw [filter_congr (fun m hm ↦ by
        by_cases hpm : p ∣ m <;> simp [hpm]
        exact (h_keep m hm hpm).symm)]
      rw [filter_join, map_join, sum_join]
      simp only [map_replicate, sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul, Multiset.Ico, card_filter, sum_eq_multiset_sum]
    rw [Factorization.balance, factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp', hsum]
    let A := P.n - P.n / P.M
    have h_card : (P.n / P.M) / p ≤ (filter (p ∣ ·) (Ico A P.n)).card := by
      rw [card_filter_dvd_eq_count, Nat.count_dvd_eq_div_sub_div (pos_of_gt P.hL) hprime.pos]
      apply le_trans (b := (P.n - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p)
      · apply le_tsub_of_add_le_left
        rw [← Nat.add_div_of_dvd_left (dvd_mul_left _ _)]
        apply Nat.div_le_div_right
        omega
      · exact le_refl _
    have h_arith : P.n / p ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) + P.M := by
      rw [← Nat.div_add_mod P.n P.M]
      apply le_trans (Nat.div_add_le_div_add_div _ _ _)
      apply add_le_add
      · rw [mul_comm, Nat.mul_div_assoc _ (dvd_mul_right _ _)]
        apply Nat.div_le_of_le_mul
        rw [mul_comm, ← Nat.mul_assoc, mul_comm]
        exact le_refl _
      · apply Nat.div_le_of_le_mul
        calc P.n % P.M ≤ P.M - 1 := Nat.le_pred_of_lt (mod_lt _ (pos_of_ne_zero (fun h => by simp [h] at P)))
          _ ≤ P.M * p := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ hprime.pos
    linarith
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Params.initial, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
    exact neg_le_zero _

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have h_fact : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) = P.n / p := by
      rw [factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp']
      simp
    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm hpm ↦ by
      have hmn : m < P.n := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hm).2
      have hkn : m / p < P.n / p := Nat.div_lt_div_of_lt_of_dvd hpm hmn hprime.pos
      have hk_sqrt : m / p < Real.sqrt P.n := by
        rw [Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)] at hp' ⊢
        calc (m / p : ℝ) ^ 2 < (P.n / p : ℝ) ^ 2 := by gcongr; norm_cast
          _ = (P.n / p : ℝ) * (P.n / p) := sq _
          _ < (P.n / p) * p := by gcongr; exact_mod_cast hp'
          _ = P.n := by rw [div_mul_cancel₀]; exact_mod_cast hprime.ne_zero
      have h_factors : ∀ q, q ∈ (m / p).primeFactors → q ≤ P.n / P.L := fun q hq ↦ by
        have := Nat.le_of_mem_primeFactors hq
        have : q < Real.sqrt P.n := this.trans_lt (mod_cast hk_sqrt)
        have : Real.sqrt P.n < P.n / P.L := by
           rw [Real.sqrt_lt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)]; exact_mod_cast P.hL
        linarith
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers, Nat.primeFactors_mul hpm (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (pos_of_gt hmn).ne')]
      intro q hq
      rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hq with h | h
      · exact h_factors q h
      · have : q = p := (Nat.primeFactors_prime hprime).eq_of_mem h
        subst this; exact hp
    have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum =
        P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card := by
      unfold Params.initial
      rw [sum_eq_multiset_sum, map_join, sum_join, map_replicate, sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul]
      congr; ext; simp only [sum_map, Multiset.Ico, Finset.sum_filter, Nat.cast_id]
      rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun x hx ↦ ?_)]
      · simp
      · have hx_mem : x ∈ Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n := hx
        by_cases hxp : p ∣ x
        · rw [if_pos (h_smooth x hx_mem hxp), if_pos hxp]
          rw [hprime.factorization, Finsupp.single_eq_same]
        · rw [if_neg hxp, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_dvd hxp]
          split_ifs; rfl; rfl
    rw [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, h_fact, h_sum]
    let N := P.n
    let K := P.n / P.M
    have h_card : (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (Finset.Ico (N - K) N)).card =
        (N - 1) / p - (N - K - 1) / p := by
      rw [Finset.card_filter_dvd_Ico (by simp [N, K, P.hL]; exact hprime.ne_zero)]
    rw [h_card]
    rw [ge_iff_le, sub_le_iff_le_add, neg_add_self, ← sub_le_iff_le_add', sub_eq_add_neg, ← sub_eq_add_neg]
    apply Int.le_of_sub_le_sub_right (b := (P.M : ℤ))
    rw [sub_sub_cancel, ← Int.ofNat_mul, ← Int.ofNat_add]
    norm_cast
    have : N / p ≤ P.M * ((N - 1) / p - (N - K - 1) / p + 1) := by
      have hK : K = N / P.M := rfl
      have hN : N = P.M * K + N % P.M := (Nat.div_add_mod N P.M).symm
      have h_count : ((N - 1) / p - (N - K - 1) / p) ≥ K / p := by
         have h1 : (N - 1) / p ≥ (N - K - 1 + K) / p := by
            apply Nat.div_le_div_right
            omega
         have h2 : (N - K - 1 + K) / p ≥ (N - K - 1) / p + K / p := Nat.le_div_add _ _ _
         linarith
      calc N / p ≤ (P.M * K + P.M) / p := by
              rw [hN]
              gcongr
              exact le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.mod_lt _ (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by have := P.hL; linarith)))) (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self _))
           _ = (P.M * (K + 1)) / p := by ring_nf
           _ ≤ P.M * ((K + 1) / p) + P.M := by
              exact Nat.mul_div_le _ _ _
           _ ≤ P.M * (K / p + 1) + P.M := by
              gcongr
              exact Nat.div_add_one_le_div_add_one (K) p
           _ ≤ P.M * ((N - 1) / p - (N - K - 1) / p + 1) := by
              gcongr; exact h_count
    linarith
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Params.initial]
    convert zero_le_of_le_zero _
    exact neg_nonpos.mpr (Nat.cast_nonneg _)

by_cases hprime : p.Prime

    rw [h_sum_card]
    
    simp only [S, Multiset.filter_join, Multiset.card_join, Multiset.map_map]
    simp only [Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul, Nat.cast_id]

    simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, sub_neg_eq_add]
    rw [← sub_le_iff_le_add]
    
    calc (P.n / p : ℤ) - P.M * ((B - 1) / p - (A - 1) / p)

      _ ≤ P.M := by

             _ < (p - 1) * P.M + P.M := by
                 gcongr; exact Nat.mod_lt _ (pos_of_mul_pos_right (pos_of_gt P.hL) P.hL_pos)
             _ = p * P.M := by
                 rw [Nat.sub_mul, one_mul, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ hprime.pos)]

    simp only [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime, sum_const_zero, sub_zero]
    linarith [Int.ofNat_nonneg P.M]

          obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := dvd_iff_exists_eq_mul_left.mp h3

          · rwa [le_mul_iff_one_le_left hprime.pos, Nat.div_le_iff_le_mul_add_pred hprime.pos]
          · rwa [lt_div_iff_mul_lt hprime.pos, add_comm, Nat.add_sub_assoc hprime.pos, add_lt_iff_neg_right, Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul_add_pred hprime.pos]
        · rintro ⟨k, ⟨h1, h2⟩, rfl⟩
          refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, dvd_mul_right _ _⟩
          · rw [← Nat.div_le_iff_le_mul_add_pred hprime.pos]; exact h1
          · rw [← Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul_add_pred hprime.pos]; exact h2

    let count := ((Finset.Ico A P.n).filter (p ∣ ·)).card
    have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum = P.M * count := by
      unfold Params.initial
      rw [sum_map_filter, sum_join, map_replicate, sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]
      congr 1; rw [sum_filter]; refine sum_congr rfl fun x hx => ?_
      split_ifs with h_dvd
      · simp [h_smooth x hx h_dvd, Nat.factorization_eq_of_lt_sqr hprime (by
          calc x < P.n := (mem_Ico.mp hx).2
             _ < p ^ 2 := by rw [Gt, Real.lt_sqrt] at hp'; exact_mod_cast hp'
          ) (pos_of_ne_zero (fun h => by subst h; simp at hx))]
      · simp [factorization_eq_zero_of_not_dvd h_dvd]
    
    rw [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp', h_sum]
    have h_count_card : count = (P.n + p - 1) / p - (A + p - 1) / p := by
      rw [h_bij, card_map, Nat.card_Ico]

    have h_bound : P.n / p ≤ P.M * count + P.M := by
      have h_div_bound : P.n / p ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) + P.M := by
        let q := (P.n / P.M) / p
        let r := (P.n / P.M) % p
        let k := P.n % P.M
        have h_n : P.n = P.M * (q * p + r) + k := by conv_lhs => rw [← Nat.div_add_mod P.n P.M, ← Nat.div_add_mod (P.n / P.M) p]
        rw [h_n, mul_add, add_assoc, Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ hprime.pos]
        apply Nat.add_le_add_left
        apply Nat.div_le_of_le_mul
        rw [mul_comm P.M p]
        have hM : 0 < P.M := by
          by_contra h; simp [h] at h_n; rw [h_n] at P; exact (not_le.mpr P.hL) (zero_le _)
        calc P.M * r + k ≤ P.M * (p - 1) + (P.M - 1) := by
               gcongr
               · exact Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ hprime.pos)
               · exact Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ hM)
             _ < P.M * p := by rw [mul_tsub, mul_one]; omega
      
      apply Nat.le_trans h_div_bound
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
      rw [h_count]
      exact Nat.div_add_div_le (P.n / P.M) (A + p - 1) p

    rw [ge_iff_le, neg_le_sub_iff_le_add]
    lift (P.n / p) to ℤ; lift (P.M * count) to ℤ; lift P.M to ℤ
    norm_cast at *; linarith

  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum,
          Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
    omega

  · have h_sqrt : p ^ 2 > P.n := by
      rw [← Real.sqrt_lt, Real.sqrt_sq (Nat.cast_nonneg _)] at hp'

    have h_val_n : (P.n).factorial.factorization p = P.n / p :=
      Params.initial.factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp'
    let I := Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n
    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ I, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm h_dvd ↦ by
      rw [Finset.mem_Ico] at hm
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers]; constructor
      · exact pos_of_gt hm.2
      · intro q hq hq_dvd
        have h_k : m / p < p := by
          apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul; rw [mul_comm]

      rw [Multiset.sum_eq_multiset_sum, Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.sum_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate]
      congr 1

        by_cases h_dvd : p ∣ m
        · rw [h_smooth m hm h_dvd] at hm; simp [h_dvd]
          rw [Nat.factorization_eq_of_exponent_one_of_prime hprime]; simp [h_dvd]
          by_contra hc; have := Nat.pow_dvd_of_le_factorization (pos_of_gt (Multiset.mem_Ico.mp hm).2) hc
          have := Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt (Multiset.mem_Ico.mp hm).2) this

        exact Finset.card_filter_dvd_Ico hprime.pos _ _

      convert Nat.div_add_div_le_div_add (P.n - P.n / P.M - 1) (P.n / P.M) p using 1
      · omega
      · rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel']
        exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (mul_div_le P.n P.M)

      apply le_trans (Nat.div_le_mul_div_add P.n P.M p)
      rw [Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul]
      gcongr
    rw [ge_iff_le, neg_le_sub_iff_le_add, ← Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_le]
    exact h_alg
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
    exact le_of_not_lt (by simp)

by_cases hprime : p.Prime

      have : -(P.n / p : ℤ) ≥ 0 := by rw [← h] at this; exact this

    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm hpm ↦ by

      simp only [Params.initial, Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_join, Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]
      rw [Multiset.sum_map_filter, Multiset.Ico, Finset.sum_filter, Finset.filter_congr]

        · rw [Nat.Prime.factorization_eq_one_of_dvd_of_not_dvd_sq hprime hpx]

          gcongr
          exact Nat.div_lt_self (by omega) (Nat.Prime.one_lt hprime) |>.le

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hfact : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) = P.n / p := by
      rw [Params.initial.factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp']

    have hsum : P.initial.sum (fun m ↦ m.factorization p) ≥ P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) := by
      let I := Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n
      have h_subset : ∀ m ∈ I, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm h_dvd ↦ by
        rw [mem_smoothNumbers, Nat.primeFactors_def]

        obtain ⟨hq_prime, hq_dvd_m⟩ := hq_mem

        by_cases hqp : q = p
        · rw [hqp]; exact hp
        · have : m / p < Real.sqrt P.n := by
            rw [Finset.mem_Ico] at hm
            apply (div_lt_iff_lt_mul (by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos)).mpr
            calc (m : ℝ) < P.n := Nat.cast_lt.mpr hm.2
              _ = Real.sqrt P.n * Real.sqrt P.n := (Real.mul_self_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)).symm
              _ < p * Real.sqrt P.n := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right hp' (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (pos_of_gt P.hL)))

          rw [Nat.cast_lt] at this
          apply le_of_lt
          apply lt_of_lt_of_le this
          rw [lt_div_iff₀ (by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos)]
          calc (P.L : ℝ) * Real.sqrt P.n < Real.sqrt P.n * Real.sqrt P.n := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right (Real.lt_sqrt_of_sq_lt (by exact_mod_cast P.hL)) (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (pos_of_gt P.hL)))
            _ = P.n := Real.mul_self_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
      have h_sum_eq : P.initial.sum (fun m ↦ m.factorization p) =
          P.M * (I.filter (p ∣ ·)).card := by
        unfold Params.initial Factorization.sum
        rw [Multiset.sum_map_mul_left, Multiset.filter_join, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.sum_join,
            Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]
        congr 1
        rw [sum_eq_multiset_sum, Multiset.filter_filter]
        rw [show (filter (fun x ↦ x ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers ∧ p ∣ x) I.val) = (filter (fun x ↦ p ∣ x) I.val) from

        rw [← Multiset.filter_map, Multiset.card_map]
        apply Multiset.card_filter_congr
        intro x hx
        rw [Multiset.mem_filter] at hx
        simp only [if_pos hx.2]
        apply (hprime.factorization_eq_one_of_lt hx.2).symm
        rw [Finset.mem_Ico] at hx
        calc x < P.n := hx.1.2
          _ < p * p := by rw [Real.lt_sqrt] at hp'; exact_mod_cast hp'

      gcongr
      rw [Finset.card_filter_dvd_Ico hprime.ne_zero]
      let A := P.n - P.n / P.M
      let B := P.n

        rw [Nat.sub_sub_sub_cancel_right (Nat.le_pred_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.sub_le _ _) (pos_of_gt P.hL)))]

    · simp at hp; have : P.n = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero hp
      simp [this]
    have hM_pos := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hM_pos

      let q := (P.n / P.M) / p
      let r := (P.n / P.M) % p
      let k := P.n % P.M
      have h_n : P.n = P.M * (q * p + r) + k := by
        rw [← Nat.div_add_mod (P.n / P.M) p, Nat.div_add_mod P.n P.M]
      rw [h_n]
      rw [add_assoc, add_comm (P.M * r) k, ← add_assoc, mul_add]
      apply Nat.div_le_of_le_mul
      rw [add_mul, mul_assoc, mul_comm p P.M, ← mul_assoc]
      apply add_le_add_left
      calc P.M * r + k
        _ ≤ P.M * (p - 1) + (P.M - 1) := add_le_add
          (mul_le_mul_left' (Nat.le_pred_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ hprime.pos)) _)
          (Nat.le_pred_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ hM_pos))

          rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, mul_one, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ hprime.pos)]

          exact Nat.one_le_of_lt hM_pos

        _ = (2 * P.M) * p := by ring

      _ ≥ (P.M * ((P.n / P.M) / p) : ℤ) - (P.n / p : ℤ) := by gcongr
      _ ≥ - (P.M : ℤ) := by linarith

  · simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime p hprime]
    rw [sum_const_zero]
    simp
    linarith

    have hfact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p := factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp'
    let I := Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n
    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ I, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := by
      intro m hm hpm
      rw [Multiset.mem_Ico] at hm
      have hm_pos : 0 < m := pos_of_gt hm.1
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers', Nat.primeFactors_mul hm_pos.ne' hpm]
      intro q hq
      rw [Finset.mem_union, Nat.mem_primeFactors_of_prime hprime] at hq
      rcases hq with rfl | hq
      · exact hp
      · have : m / p < P.n / p := Nat.div_lt_div_of_lt_of_dvd hm.2 hpm hp_pos
        have hn_sqrt : P.n / p < P.n / P.L := by
           rw [Nat.div_lt_div_iff_mul_lt_mul hp_pos (by have := P.hL_pos; omega)]
           calc P.n * P.L < (p * p) * P.L := by
                  rw [Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)] at hp'
                  norm_cast at hp'; nlinarith
                _ ≤ (p * P.L) * p := by ring_nf; apply Nat.mul_le_mul_right; exact hp
                _ ≤ P.n * p := Nat.mul_le_mul_right p hp
        exact (Nat.le_of_mem_primeFactors hq).trans (this.trans (Nat.le_refl _))
    
    have hsum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum = P.M * (I.filter (p ∣ ·)).card := by
      rw [Params.initial, Multiset.sum_map_filter, Multiset.sum_map_replicate_join,
        Multiset.map_const, Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]
      congr 1
      rw [Multiset.sum_map_if, Multiset.sum_const_zero, add_zero, Multiset.map_const,
        Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one]
      refine Multiset.card_filter_congr (fun m hm => ?_)
      rw [Multiset.mem_Ico] at hm
      simp only [Nat.factorization_eq_one_of_prime_of_dvd_of_not_dvd_sq hprime _
        (fun hsq => by
          have := Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt hm.1) hsq
          have : p^2 > P.n := by rw [Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)] at hp'; exact_mod_cast hp'
          linarith),
        if_pos, eq_iff_iff]
      exact ⟨fun h => h_smooth m hm h, fun _ => trivial⟩
      
    have h_count : (I.filter (p ∣ ·)).card ≥ P.n / P.M / p := by
      rw [Multiset.count_dvd_Ico]
      let A := P.n - P.n / P.M
      let B := P.n
      rcases eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_le A) with rfl | hA
      · simp only [tsub_zero, Nat.div_one]
        exact Nat.div_le_div_add_one
      · apply Nat.sub_div_le_sub_div A (B - 1) p

    calc (P.initial.balance p : ℤ) = P.M * (I.filter (p ∣ ·)).card - (P.n / p : ℤ) := by
           rw [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hsum, hfact]; simp
         _ ≥ P.M * (P.n / P.M / p) - (P.n / p : ℤ) := by gcongr; exact h_count
         _ ≥ -P.M := by
           have : P.M * (P.n / P.M / p) + P.M ≥ P.n / p := by
             rw [Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul]
             exact Nat.div_le_mul_add_mod (P.n/p) P.M
           norm_cast; linarith
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime]; omega
